headline: Barclays Reaffirms Overweight Rating on Evergy (EVRG)
summary: Evergy Inc. (NASDAQ:EVRG) is one of the 10 best regulated electric stocks to buy according to hedge funds. As of the March 13 closing, Evergy Inc. (NASDAQ:EVRG) carried a moderately bullish consensus sentiment. 6 of the 9 analysts who provided coverage assigned a Buy rating to the stock, while 3 gave Hold calls. With no […]
